title: Catherine Classic

notes:
When the game is started, immediately a black screen is shown. In the lower left corner a version number is shown, the mouse cursor is visible and background music is playing. However nothing to click on is shown, and therefore one can not play the game. Disabling Esync, Disabling D3d11 and using Wine D3d11 did not affect the described situation.

According to the Steam discussions, Windows players get a graphics config file in C//users/yourusername/AppData/Roaming/TheEccentricApe/Catherine . I tried finding this file in my compatdata (compatdata/893180/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/AppData did not contain a roaming folder), with no success. So apparently the game is stuck before even generating this file.
title: Catherine Classic

notes:
Game launches but just a black screen with the version number of the game on the bottom left. Music seems to be playing fine and the games cursor is visible when i move the mouse.

Just won't render anything.

Tried with Proton 3.16-6, 3.16-4 and 3.7-8 and various built-in tweaks ('Disable Esync', 'Disable D3d11' and 'Use Wine D3d11'). Same results more or less.

I'd love to get this working. So if anyone has any tips, please holler here.

title: Catherine Classic

notes: The game launches to a black screen, and if you press any button/key and wait a few seconds then the game will load into the main menu. From here, you can change settings and attempt to start the game. However, the game won't play and stalls on an infinite loading screen. However, if you change any game settings then these save. Proton currently doesn't support WMV playback and this is the cause for the game not starting and the black loading screen. If this was fixed, the game would run perfectly I imagine.
title: Catherine Classic

notes: Some fading works on the mouse cursor at boot, and sound effects play. However, there is still a black screen. If you wait, you'll see a flash of the Criware logo - If you click to skip the game's titles, this will also happen. The main menu works fine, the problem with the game is that it locks up when you try to start a new game or load an existing game - Due to Proton lacking WMV support.
title: Catherine Classic

Literally the only thing I noticed was a missing character symbol in the first character of a text, and even then I think it's because something's wrong with my Arch.

THANK YOU TO EVERYONE INVOLVED
